listening.title: Listening: Registration form
listening.transcript: Good morning. My name is David Brown. I am twenty-two years old. I am American. My occupation is an engineer. My email is david dot brown at email dot com.

questions.question: Name: David ___
questions.explanation: Người nói nói "My name is David Brown".

listening.title: Listening: Introducing the family
listening.transcript: This is my family. My father is a farmer and my mother is a teacher. I have two brothers. We are not a small family. We are very close.
